data.name: Barely Working
data.detailed_description:
Play as Candace, the office slut, who has to finish her work by the end of the day. Unfortunately, her colleagues are used to coming to her desk for a quick fuck. You must make sure Candace fucks her colleagues as fast as possible so that she can continue working!

Work in an Office and Respond to your Co-worker's Messages

Have Sex and Work at the Same Time

Discover New Areas to Work

Barely Working is a game where you manage your work productivity by balancing sex and work. Your co-workers will send you messages with hints on what they want from you and you must adjust your clothing accordingly. Sometimes Candace will need to have sex with them and sometimes she'll have to respond to them a certain way in order to get through her day.

If you're successful, Candace will have a day filled with sex, but most importantly, she'll finish her job!

data.short_description: Barely Working is a puzzle game where you manage work and sex at the same time. Respond to your colleague's messages and take their sexual requests in order to fulfill your productivity for the day!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS Catalina
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any Distribution
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
